layer: design-layer oracle — component/contract + flow tests derived from the HLD; DISTINCT from the aPRD black-box acceptance oracle (Phase 0). SPECS not code (Phase 4 MATERIALIZE-ORACLE writes the code).

contract_tests.shape_assertion: Seam carries Freelancer identity record (E1) — provider token and user profile reference — between Identity & Auth and Data Store; create-or-update on OAuth callback and read on session resolution move across this seam.

failure_assertions.failure_mode: store-unavailable — PostgreSQL instance unreachable; OAuth callback cannot persist the identity record, login fails
failure_assertions.expected_behavior: Identity & Auth receives no successful write acknowledgement; the OAuth callback aborts without persisting the identity record and the login attempt fails.

failure_assertions.failure_mode: constraint-violation — uniqueness constraint on provider identity (e.g. duplicate provider_id insert on concurrent callbacks); write fails
failure_assertions.expected_behavior: Data Store rejects the write with a constraint-violation error; Identity & Auth must handle the rejection and not produce a partial or duplicate identity record.

failure_assertions.failure_mode: partial-failure — write begins but connection drops before commit; ACID transaction rolls back, no partial record persisted
failure_assertions.expected_behavior: ACID transaction rolls back in full; no partial identity record is persisted in the Data Store.

contract_tests.shape_assertion: Seam carries Client Project and related entity records (E2, E5, E6, E7) between Project Management and Data Store; create, read (list + detail), update, and delete of project-level records move across this seam.

failure_assertions.failure_mode: store-unavailable — PostgreSQL instance unreachable; project create/read/update/delete operations fail
failure_assertions.expected_behavior: Project Management receives no successful store response; all project create/read/update/delete operations fail without producing or modifying any record.

failure_assertions.failure_mode: constraint-violation — FK integrity failure (e.g. orphaned project referencing deleted freelancer) or uniqueness violation on project name within owner scope
failure_assertions.expected_behavior: Data Store rejects the write with a constraint-violation error; Project Management must handle the rejection and not persist an inconsistent or duplicate project record.

failure_assertions.failure_mode: not-found — queried project record does not exist in the store (deleted or wrong owner scope)
failure_assertions.expected_behavior: Data Store returns no matching record; Project Management must surface a not-found result to the caller without fabricating project data.

contract_tests.shape_assertion: Seam carries authenticated freelancer session signal — Project Management calls Identity & Auth in-process to resolve current session and obtain the freelancer identity (E1 reference) used to scope all project data reads and writes.

failure_assertions.failure_mode: no-valid-session — session absent or expired; Identity & Auth returns no authenticated identity; Project Management must reject the request (unauthorized)
failure_assertions.expected_behavior: Identity & Auth returns no authenticated identity; Project Management must reject the request as unauthorized without reading or writing any project data.

failure_assertions.failure_mode: callee-error — Identity & Auth raises an exception during session resolution (e.g. store lookup failure for identity record); Project Management cannot determine ownership and must fail the request
failure_assertions.expected_behavior: Identity & Auth raises an exception; Project Management cannot determine ownership and must fail the request without processing any project operation.

contract_tests.shape_assertion: Seam carries Time Entry records (E3) between Time Logging and Data Store; create (new entry) and read (list entries per project) move across this seam, with project and freelancer association expressed via foreign-key references in E3.

failure_assertions.failure_mode: store-unavailable — PostgreSQL instance unreachable; time entry cannot be persisted or retrieved
failure_assertions.expected_behavior: Time Logging receives no successful store response; time entry cannot be persisted or retrieved and the operation fails.

failure_assertions.failure_mode: constraint-violation — FK constraint failure (e.g. referenced project does not exist or is deleted concurrently); write rejected
failure_assertions.expected_behavior: Data Store rejects the write with a FK constraint-violation error; Time Logging must handle the rejection and not persist the time entry.

failure_assertions.failure_mode: not-found — entry set queried for a project returns empty or the project association is missing
failure_assertions.expected_behavior: Data Store returns no matching time entries; Time Logging must surface an empty or missing result without fabricating entry data.

contract_tests.shape_assertion: Seam carries Client Project record reference (E2) including Currency (E5) and Billable Rate (E7) — Time Logging calls Project Management in-process to validate the target project exists and is owned by the authenticated freelancer and to inherit project-level currency and rate.

failure_assertions.failure_mode: not-found — referenced project does not exist or does not belong to the authenticated freelancer; Time Logging must reject the entry
failure_assertions.expected_behavior: Project Management returns no matching project; Time Logging must reject the time entry without persisting any association.

failure_assertions.failure_mode: callee-error — Project Management raises an exception during project lookup (e.g. transient store error); Time Logging cannot validate the association and must fail
failure_assertions.expected_behavior: Project Management raises an exception; Time Logging cannot validate the project association and must fail the entry creation without partial state.

contract_tests.shape_assertion: Seam carries Time Entry records (E3) queried by Invoice Export from the Data Store — read-only aggregate query filtered by project reference and calendar month for line-item generation.

failure_assertions.failure_mode: store-unavailable — PostgreSQL instance unreachable; invoice aggregation query cannot execute; export fails
failure_assertions.expected_behavior: Invoice Export receives no query result; the aggregation query cannot execute and the export fails without producing partial invoice data.

failure_assertions.failure_mode: not-found — no time entries exist for the given project and calendar month; zero-line-item result (edge case the export flow must handle)
failure_assertions.expected_behavior: Data Store returns an empty result set; Invoice Export must handle the zero-line-item case without treating it as an error or fabricating entries.

failure_assertions.failure_mode: partial-failure — query returns a partial result set due to a cursor or connection error mid-read; incomplete invoice line items
failure_assertions.expected_behavior: Invoice Export detects a partial result set due to mid-read cursor or connection error and must not produce a completed invoice from incomplete data.

contract_tests.shape_assertion: Seam carries Client Project header data — Currency designation (E5), Billable Rate (E7), and Client record (E6) — from Project Management to Invoice Export in-process for invoice line-item computation and invoice header population.

failure_assertions.failure_mode: not-found — referenced project does not exist or is not accessible; invoice export cannot proceed without rate and currency
failure_assertions.expected_behavior: Project Management returns no matching project; Invoice Export cannot proceed without rate and currency and must fail the export.

failure_assertions.failure_mode: callee-error — Project Management raises an exception during project data retrieval; Invoice Export cannot compute monetary totals and must fail the request
failure_assertions.expected_behavior: Project Management raises an exception; Invoice Export cannot compute monetary totals and must fail the request without generating partial output.

contract_tests.shape_assertion: Seam carries session presence signal — Web Ingress calls Identity & Auth in-process on each authenticated route to verify a valid session before dispatching to a domain component; result is authenticated (dispatch proceeds) or unauthenticated (redirect to login).

failure_assertions.failure_mode: no-valid-session — no session cookie present or session is expired; Web Ingress must redirect to the OAuth login entry point rather than dispatching to the domain component
failure_assertions.expected_behavior: Identity & Auth returns no valid session; Web Ingress must redirect to the OAuth login entry point and must not dispatch the request to any domain component.

failure_assertions.failure_mode: callee-error — Identity & Auth raises an exception during session check (e.g. store lookup failure); Web Ingress must treat the request as unauthenticated and redirect
failure_assertions.expected_behavior: Identity & Auth raises an exception; Web Ingress must treat the request as unauthenticated and redirect to the login entry point without dispatching to any domain component.

contract_tests.shape_assertion: Seam carries project management page request dispatch — Web Ingress routes an authenticated HTTP request in-process to Project Management, which returns a server-rendered HTML response (project list, detail, create/edit/delete forms).

failure_assertions.failure_mode: callee-error — Project Management raises an unhandled exception during request processing; Web Ingress must return an appropriate HTTP error response
failure_assertions.expected_behavior: Project Management raises an unhandled exception; Web Ingress must return an appropriate HTTP error response and must not propagate the raw exception to the browser.

failure_assertions.failure_mode: not-found — requested project resource does not exist (e.g. detail view for a deleted project); Project Management returns a not-found result; Web Ingress renders a 404 page
failure_assertions.expected_behavior: Project Management returns a not-found result for the requested resource; Web Ingress must render a 404 page response.

contract_tests.shape_assertion: Seam carries time-logging page request dispatch — Web Ingress routes an authenticated HTTP request in-process to Time Logging, which returns a server-rendered HTML response (time entry form, time entry list per project).

failure_assertions.failure_mode: callee-error — Time Logging raises an unhandled exception during request processing; Web Ingress must return an appropriate HTTP error response
failure_assertions.expected_behavior: Time Logging raises an unhandled exception; Web Ingress must return an appropriate HTTP error response and must not propagate the raw exception to the browser.

failure_assertions.failure_mode: not-found — requested project context for time logging does not exist; Time Logging returns a not-found result; Web Ingress renders a 404 page
failure_assertions.expected_behavior: Time Logging returns a not-found result for the requested project context; Web Ingress must render a 404 page response.

contract_tests.shape_assertion: Seam carries invoice export request dispatch — Web Ingress routes an authenticated HTTP request in-process to Invoice Export, which streams a PDF binary response to the browser as a file download (content-type application/pdf).

failure_assertions.failure_mode: callee-error — Invoice Export raises an unhandled exception during PDF generation or aggregation; Web Ingress must return an appropriate HTTP error response instead of a partial or broken PDF
failure_assertions.expected_behavior: Invoice Export raises an unhandled exception; Web Ingress must return an appropriate HTTP error response and must not stream a partial or broken PDF to the browser.

failure_assertions.failure_mode: not-found — the specified project or calendar month yields no accessible data; Invoice Export cannot produce a valid invoice; Web Ingress renders an error response
failure_assertions.expected_behavior: Invoice Export cannot produce a valid invoice due to no accessible data for the project or calendar month; Web Ingress must render an error response.

happy_path.assertion: Walking-skeleton path traverses CT8 (Web Ingress → Identity & Auth session check) and CT1 (Identity & Auth → Data Store identity write/read) and arrives at acceptance oracle AC1 and AC5.

failure_path.expected_terminal_state: OAuth callback cannot persist the identity record; no authenticated session is established; Web Ingress redirects the browser to the login entry point with an error
